title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-10
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just watered the plants, updating the daily metrics and health checks for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and Greenhouse status in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and Greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The robot monitor and Polly the bee checking on pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with a checklist.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the cute bee mascot in a digital greenhouse. They are inspecting glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the cute bee mascot in a digital greenhouse.
